steps.title: Use the graph direction
steps.content: The graph falls from left to right, so the slope is negative. That eliminates the choices with positive slopes.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: Using the marked points $(0,-5)$ and $(7,-8)$, the slope is $$ \frac{-8-(-5)}{7-0}=-\frac{3}{7} $$ The $y$-intercept is $-5$, so the equation is $$ f(x)=-\frac{3}{7}x-5 $$ The answer is C.
